## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Noboringdesign to discuss content strategy, site structure issues, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content creation proceeding smoothly; 10 new articles to be uploaded by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Critical site structure issues identified: page title inconsistencies, thin content pages, and sitemap misalignment](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [New meeting link created for blog-specific lead tracking](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Performance metrics show increasing impressions despite indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Approval Process

  - [GrowthX given autonomy to generate and publish content without prior approval](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [NBD confirms alignment with topics on marketing assets, visuals, and tool-specific content (e.g., Canva, YouTube banners)](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [New typography cluster added, focusing on font selection and trends (not font creation)](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

### Site Structure Issues

  - [Page title inconsistencies: 106 pages sharing the same generic title "live-nbd-site"](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [URL structure discrepancies: some use "case-study", others use "case-studies"](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Thin content pages identified (e.g., Copywriting page) needing enrichment or de-indexing](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Sitemap misalignment: URLs pointing to www, but sitemap set to HTTPS, causing 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

### Performance Metrics and Tracking

  - [Site impressions increasing week-over-week despite indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Only 2 clicks on actual content due to Google not seeing much content](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [New meeting link created specifically for tracking blog-driven leads](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Google Analytics exploration needed for individual blog post tracking](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)

### Technical Support and Follow-up

  - [Detailed agenda provided for NBD's dev team to address site structure issues](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Potential rescheduling of next week's call to include GrowthX's managing director for in-depth technical discussion](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

## Next Steps

  - [NBD to forward site structure issues to their dev team for resolution](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Update URLs in sitemap to include www and resubmit to Google](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement new meeting link in blog posts for lead tracking](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Explore Google Analytics capabilities for individual blog post performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call with GrowthX's managing director for technical deep-dive](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [NBD to provide any copywriter feedback on blog content when available](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [GrowthX to complete content uploads before end of day Thursday (pre-holiday)](https://fathom.video/share/w_QvcJzGk8MZb71qRam5EXFzAXZNRoTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
